name: RoadResQ Local

values.description: Backend server URL. Change to your deployed URL when in production.
Auto-filled by POST /api/auth/register. Firebase UID of the logged-in customer.
Auto-filled by Register Driver request. Firebase UID of the driver.
Auto-filled by POST /api/jobs. UUID of the last created job.
Auto-filled by Create Job (Heavy). UUID of the heavy transport job.
Auto-filled by Create Job (Repair). UUID of the repair job.
Auto-filled by GET /api/jobs/available. ID of the first available job.
Auto-filled by POST /api/quotes. UUID of the quote request.
Firebase ID token for the POST /api/auth/login endpoint. Get this from Flutter after sign-in, or from Firebase REST API.
Auto-filled on login/register. Role of the current user.

description:
Local development environment for RoadResQ API.

Import this file into Postman, then select 'RoadResQ Local' from the environment dropdown.

Most variables are auto-filled by test scripts when you run requests in order.
